**Summary**
In one line, what does this pull request do? Say it in plain words.

**Linked issue**
Closes #

**Type of change**
Tick one.
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

**Screenshots or clip**
These are UI components, so if your change is visual, please add a screenshot or a short clip. This helps us review faster.

**How you tested it**
A short note is fine. For example: "I built it and saw it render in a SolidJS app."

**Checklist before review**
- [ ] My change is focused on one thing.
- [ ] I followed the existing code style.
- [ ] I updated the docs if they needed it.
- [ ] I kept solid-js and @kserp/host-ui external (I did not bundle them).

Thank you for your work on this. We will review it soon, and we may suggest a few small changes.
